original_image_tags: Black-and-white technical drawing or diagram on a dark background, divided into two sections. The top section shows a four-bladed propeller or rotor shape. The bottom section shows a cross-sectional or side-view diagram of a saucer-shaped vehicle. The page appears to be a technical or patent-like drawing in Spanish.
A four-lobed or four-bladed shape radiating from a central hub, resembling a propeller or rotor viewed from above. Arrows and labels indicate movement and function.
A diagram showing a cross-section or side view of a lenticular or saucer-shaped vehicle. The internal structure is labeled with various chambers and components.

elements.description: A diagram featuring a four-bladed propeller or helix design. Visible text includes the titles 'HELIEE.' and 'CAPTU-AEREO-FUERZA.', with labels such as 'Capta', 'Corta', and 'Expulsa' pointing to different parts of the blades. Arrows indicate the 'Direccion de las corrientes del Aire' and 'Suction'.

A cross-sectional diagram of a mechanical or aeronautical device, possibly a housing for a propeller. Visible labels include 'Fuerza', 'Camaras de Oxigeno', 'Helice', 'Entrada de las corrientes de Aire', and 'Expulsion del Aire', with various numerical notations like '1', '2', and '3'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence and nature of the two visual elements (a four-bladed propeller diagram and a cross-sectional diagram of a saucer-shaped device), and while they provide different levels of detail about labels, they do not contradict each other on any specific quoted text.
